wordGroups.label: Silent Letters
evidence: Teacher heading 'Silent Letters' in Unit 9 Week 3 spelling assignment
Words contain silent consonants (gn, kn, wr) that are canonical spelling production targets
Placement in Benchmark Advance spelling curriculum indicates these are spelling test words

wordGroups.label: High-Frequency Words
evidence: Teacher heading explicitly names 'High-Frequency Words'
High-frequency word lists in grade 2 curricula typically focus on fast recognition and reading fluency rather than spelling production alone
These words are common sight words meant to be read automatically

assumptions:
## Hypothesis
No confirmed diagnostic pattern yet; the quest should probe whether the homework format itself creates the gap.

## Prediction
Pattern: content_fit_gap
Risk words/items: sign, know, write, among, building

## Intervention
active word production from memory

## Success criteria
- Accuracy at least 80%
- Improvement at least 15 percentage points

## Evidence
- No confirmed diagnostic pattern yet.
